description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly light tan to beige coloration. Its surface is uneven, featuring a mix of flat and jagged areas, with some subtle crevices and natural weathering marks visible across its faces. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cracks or signs of artificial modification. Its texture is coarse and gritty, typical of sedimentary or weathered stone found in outdoor environments. The coloration is mostly uniform, though some areas show slight variations in shade due to natural mineral deposits. This rock would be well-suited as a natural barrier or landscape feature in an urban park or roadside setting.
description: A large, rugged, light tan rock with an uneven, coarse surface and natural weathering marks. Its angular shape and solid appearance make it suitable as a barrier or landscape element.
description_view_0: The rock appears elongated with a prominent angular edge and visible surface ridges.
description_view_1: This view shows a broad, relatively flat face with subtle color variations and a rounded edge.
description_view_2: The rock looks more tapered, with a sloped surface and a pointed end visible.
description_view_3: A long, jagged side is visible, highlighting the rock's rough texture and angular profile.
